response.justification: The candidate has strong hands-on engineering breadth across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with 13+ years of experience, but the resume shows no evidence of formal people management, team leadership, or developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure ownership at the scale this role requires. The role is a people-leadership position focused on engineering productivity for a major mobile platform ecosystem, and the candidate's profile is that of an individual contributor.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot software engineering experience with testing/TDD focus
Some exposure to dev-ops tooling (GitLab, CI servers, Docker) and test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated teaching/community work (Selenium course, workshops, dojos) suggesting mentorship inclination
concerns: No people-management or team-leadership roles on the resume (2-year minimum unmet)
No substantive mobile-platform ecosystem experience (brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016 only)
Limited evidence of developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure ownership at organizational scale

key_factors.factor: Strong IC engineering breadth and testing focus
